message.reasoning_content:
The user is describing a scenario about a CPU saturation after a bad worker config. They provided a detailed scenario_id, title, category, round, description, metrics, health, signals, recent logs, and allowed_tools, as well as a tool_map and choice_maps. I need to analyze this and provide a diagnosis and safe action.

First, I need to understand the context. The user is describing a problem where a CPU saturates after a bad worker config. The metrics show high CPU usage (34%), ram (45%), disk (33%), inode (15%), and the worker_multiplier is 2. The health indicates the API is healthy. The signals show worker_multiplier is 2. The recent logs show INFO scheduler up and INFO baseline load normal.

The allowed_tools are ["inspect_metrics", "restart_service", "throttle_concurrency"]. The tool_map maps tool IDs to types: 0 -> inspect_metrics, 1 -> restart_service, 2 -> throttle_concurrency.

The choice_maps have status, type, subtype, root mappings. The status has values 0,1,2,3,4,5. The type has values 0,1,2,3,4,
